title: Doing build crashes podman machine
body:
### Issue Description

Issuing a build command to podman causes the podman machine to crash.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create new machine `podman machine init --cpus 2 --memory 3200 -v /Users:/Users -v /private:/private -v /var/folders:/var/folders --now`
2. `podman build -t test-image .`

The Dockerfile can be as simple as
```
FROM node:18-alpine
```

### Describe the results you received

Crashes with the following output:
```
ERRO[0005] 1 error occurred:
* io: read/write on closed pipe

Error: Post "http://d/v4.5.0/libpod/build?dockerfile=%5B%22Dockerfile%22%5D&forcerm=1&httpproxy=1&identitylabel=1&idmappingoptions=%7B%22HostUIDMapping%22%3Atrue%2C%22HostGIDMapping%22%3Atrue%2C%22UIDMap%22%3A%5B%5D%2C%22GIDMap%22%3A%5B%5D%2C%22AutoUserNs%22%3Afalse%2C%22AutoUserNsOpts%22%3A%7B%22Size%22%3A0%2C%22InitialSize%22%3A0%2C%22PasswdFile%22%3A%22%22%2C%22GroupFile%22%3A%22%22%2C%22AdditionalUIDMappings%22%3Anull%2C%22AdditionalGIDMappings%22%3Anull%7D%7D&isolation=3&jobs=1&layers=1&networkmode=0&nsoptions=%5B%7B%22Name%22%3A%22user%22%2C%22Host%22%3Atrue%2C%22Path%22%3A%22%22%7D%5D&omithistory=0&output=mwp-simple-test&outputformat=application%2Fvnd.oci.image.manifest.v1%2Bjson&platform=%2F&pullpolicy=missing&rm=1&shmsize=67108864&t=mwp-simple-test": write tcp 127.0.0.1:60518->127.0.0.1:60276: write: broken pipe
```

After this the machine will no longer start.

### Describe the results you expected

The build should be created.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

MacOS Ventura 13.2.1

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: Nevermind running a `brew remove podman && brew install podman` seems to have fixed it for now. Feeling a bit stupid right now.

Thanks for reaching out, @niklashedlund1337!

Feel free to reopen in case you see the error again.
